item.title: Ajinomoto Foods North America, Inc. Expands Recall for Chicken and Pork Fried Rice, Ramen, and Shu Mai Products Due to Possible Foreign Matter Contamination
item.product: Ajinomoto Foods North America, Inc. Expands Recall for Chicken and Pork Fried Rice, Ramen, and Shu Mai Products Due to Possible Foreign Matter Contamination
item.summary: Ajinomoto Foods North America Ajinomoto Toyo Frozen Noodle, Inc. Ajinomoto Foods North America Active Tue, 03/03/2026 - Current Nationwide Editor’s Note: Mar. 9, 2026 – The product list in this release has been updated to reflect that products with the listed lot numbers, regardless of best-by date, are subject to the recall. View product list. View labels. WASHINGTON, March 3, 2026 – Ajinomoto Foods... Impacted Products PHA-03012026-01 Public Health Alert Unreported Allergens
item.affectedPeople: Consumers who purchased the affected meat, poultry, or egg product.
item.remedy: Do not consume affected products; follow USDA FSIS recall or public health alert instructions.
item.payoutAmount: Refund, disposal, or return instructions if stated by the official notice
